fields.title: Software Developer
fields.description: Build and maintain scalable web applications using modern frameworks.
fields.requirements:
Proficiency in Python and Django
Experience with PostgreSQL
Strong problem-solving skills
Ability to work in a team

fields.title: Financial Analyst
fields.description: Analyze financial data, prepare reports, and support strategic decision-making.
fields.requirements:
Bachelor's degree in Finance or Accounting
Strong Excel and data analysis skills
Knowledge of financial modeling

fields.title: Nurse Practitioner
fields.description: Provide patient care and support in a busy healthcare environment.
fields.requirements:
Valid nursing license
Experience in patient care
Strong communication skills

fields.title: Marketing Manager
fields.description: Lead marketing campaigns to grow brand awareness and customer engagement.
fields.requirements:
Degree in Marketing or Business
5+ years experience in marketing leadership
Strong digital marketing skills

fields.title: Data Scientist
fields.description: Develop machine learning models to solve business and social challenges.
fields.requirements:
Proficiency in Python or R
Experience with ML frameworks (TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn)
Strong statistical background

fields.title: Teacher
fields.description: Teach mathematics and mentor students in secondary school.
fields.requirements:
Bachelor's degree in Education
Subject specialization in Mathematics
Passion for teaching and mentoring

fields.title: Civil Engineer
fields.description: Design and oversee road construction projects across Kenya.
fields.requirements:
Degree in Civil Engineering
Registered with Engineers Board of Kenya
Experience in project management

fields.title: Customer Service Representative
fields.description: Handle customer inquiries and provide support via phone and email.
fields.requirements:
Excellent communication skills
Experience in customer service
Ability to multitask

fields.title: Graphic Designer
fields.description: Design marketing materials and digital assets for clients.
fields.requirements:
Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite
Strong portfolio of design work
Creativity and attention to detail

fields.title: Human Resource Officer
fields.description: Manage recruitment, employee relations, and HR compliance.
fields.requirements:
Degree in HR or Business Administration
Knowledge of labor laws
Strong interpersonal skills

fields.title: Sales Executive
fields.description: Drive sales growth through client acquisition and relationship management.
fields.requirements:
Proven sales experience
Excellent negotiation skills
Ability to meet targets

fields.title: Cybersecurity Specialist
fields.description: Protect government systems from cyber threats and ensure compliance with security standards.
fields.requirements:
Degree in Computer Science or IT Security
Knowledge of firewalls, intrusion detection, and encryption
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
